/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.0.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.5 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/src/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/src/SpatialRootPaths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/src/SubprocessRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/src/FileDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/src/stb_image_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/__/__/__/thirdparty/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/__/__/__/thirdparty/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/__/__/__/thirdparty/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/__/__/__/thirdparty/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/__/__/__/thirdparty/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/__/__/__/thirdparty/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/__/__/__/thirdparty/imgui/misc/cpp/imgui_stdlib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spatialroot_gui.dir/src/FileDialog_macOS.mm.o -o "Spatial Root"  -framework AppKit ../../spatial_engine/realtimeEngine/libEngineSessionCore.a glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_spatial.a ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_audio.a ../../../allolib-build/external/rtaudio/librtaudio.a -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreFoundation ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_params.a ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_file.a ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_osc.a ../../../allolib-build/libcult_allolib_core.a ../../../allolib-build/external/liboscpack.a ../../../allolib-build/external/Gamma/lib/libGamma.a ../../../libsndfile-build/libsndfile.a -lm -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework QuartzCore -framework CoreFoundation
